items.title: Give every PR an ephemeral full-stack preview environment
items.why: CI is structurally blind to deployed-state, real-data-shape, third-party-drift, browser, and cross-service bugs. A per-PR deployed environment surfaces those before merge instead of in production.
how_to_steps: Describe the full stack (app + backend services + DB + queues/caches) as code with Compose, Helm, or Terraform.
Trigger provisioning on PR open via CI, giving each PR an isolated namespace/stack and a unique HTTPS URL.
Seed or clone an isolated database per environment so branches never share state.
Auto-destroy the environment on merge/close and post the preview URL to the PR for reviewers and QA.
items.evidence: Per-PR preview environments target five bug classes CI cannot catch (deployed-state, real-data-shape, third-party integration drift, browser regressions, cross-component flows); teams report catching UI/integration bugs before merge and removing shared-staging contention.
items.try_today: Stand up a per-PR preview for one service and share the URL on your next PR for QA.
